summary: Iteration 20 - Admin Category Management feature FULLY TESTED. All 20 backend tests passed (pytest). Frontend UI verified: Tournaments tab (renamed from Controls), Settings > Tournament Categories section with searchable dropdown, More dropdown on leaderboard for >5 categories.

backend: GET /api/admin/arxiv-categories returns 155+ categories with id, name, group, active fields
Each category has correct structure: id (string), name (string), group (string), active (boolean)
Active categories are marked correctly (active=True matches admin active list)
Endpoint requires admin authentication (401/403 without X-Admin-Token)
POST /api/admin/categories/add successfully adds category to active list
Add endpoint rejects invalid category IDs (400 error)
Add endpoint rejects already-active categories (400 error)
Add endpoint requires admin authentication
POST /api/admin/categories/remove successfully removes category from active list
Remove endpoint protects against removing last category (400 error)
Remove endpoint rejects removing inactive categories (400 error)
Remove endpoint requires admin authentication
GET /api/admin/category-estimate/{cat_id} returns estimates for valid categories
Estimate includes: estimated_weekly_papers, estimated_weekly_matches, estimated_weekly_cost, existing_papers, existing_matches
Estimate endpoint rejects invalid category IDs (400 error)
Estimate endpoint requires admin authentication
GET /api/categories returns dynamic list of active categories
Public categories match admin active list
Categories update dynamically after add/remove operations
Leaderboard works correctly with all active categories
frontend: Leaderboard shows first 5 categories as individual tabs (hot picks)
'More' dropdown appears when >5 categories exist, shows additional categories
Admin panel has 'Tournaments' tab (renamed from Controls)
Admin Settings tab shows 'Tournament Categories' section
5 active categories displayed with id, name, group, and Estimate button
Searchable dropdown filters by category ID (e.g., 'cs.AI')
Searchable dropdown filters by category name (e.g., 'Machine Learning')
Dropdown shows categories grouped by discipline

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified the new category management feature. Active categories: cs.RO, cs.DC, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM (5 total). The /api/admin/arxiv-categories endpoint returns 155+ categories from the full arXiv taxonomy. Add/remove operations properly update both admin and public category lists. The leaderboard shows first 5 as tabs and uses 'More' dropdown for additional categories. The admin Settings tab has a searchable category dropdown that filters by id, name, and group.
